name: [GRIDHAND] E-commerce Agent - Order placed → confirmation → shipping update → delivery con

gridhand.scenario: Order placed → confirmation → shipping update → delivery confirmation
gridhand.description: When a customer places an order on their online store, integrated with Shopify, GRIDHAND's automation workflow is triggered, sending a confirmation email to the customer via Mailchimp within minutes, followed by a shipping update email with tracking information as soon as the order is fulfilled, and finally a delivery confirmation email once the package is marked as delivered, all of which helps reduce customer inquiries and improves overall customer satisfaction for the retail store owner. This streamlined process saves the business owner time and reduces errors, allowing them to focus on managing their store and serving customers. By automating these routine communications, the business owner can also gain valuable insights into customer engagement and order fulfillment metrics, enabling data-driven decisions to drive growth and revenue.
